description_for_human: Loty akrobacyjne z Mistrzem Świata Maciejem Kulaszewskim. Vouchery od 1 999 PLN, campy, uprawnienie akrobacja, pokazy lotnicze. Extra 300L SP-EKS, Radom.
description_for_model: akrobacja.com offers aerobatic flights on Extra 300L SP-EKS aircraft with World Champion pilot Maciej Kulaszewski (2022 World Champion, multiple Polish, English and German champion). Services: voucher flights (1999-4999 PLN), aerobatic camp (7777 PLN, 2 days, 6 flights), aerobatic rating course FCL.800 (20900 PLN net, up to 90% subsidized via BUR/PUP/KFS), airshow performances (from 14990 PLN). Located at Radom-Piastów Airport (EPRP), 100km from Warsaw, Poland.
